page_metadata.biotools__summary: Assess alignment confidence scores for the identification of unreliable alignment regions. Users input a set of unaligned sequences, output is a graphic visualization of the alignment with confidence scores at each residue.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Assess alignment confidence scores for the identification of unreliable alignment regions. Users input a set of unaligned sequences, output is a graphic visualization of the alignment with confidence scores at each residue.
